title: physai CLI config
description: Schema for ~/.physai/config.yaml — global CLI configuration. The 'host' field is required at runtime unless overridden by the --host flag.

host.description: SSH host alias or address for the HyperPod login node. Required at runtime unless --host is passed.

model_config_roots.description: List of local directory paths to search for model config directories referenced by run_config.yaml model.config_dir.
